# Hexagamers

A board game review and guide site for tabletop enthusiasts of all experience levels. All content comes from real playthroughs and first-hand experience. No paid promotions.

## What Hexagamers Covers

- **Reviews** — Detailed takes on what works, what doesn't, who'll love a game, and whether it's worth the price. Includes Likes/Dislikes breakdowns for quick scanning.
- **How-To-Play Guides** — Simplified rulebooks so players spend less time reading and more time playing. Covers setup, turn structure, win conditions, and common rules questions.
- **Best-Of Lists** — Curated picks organized by player count, age group, game category, price, and occasion.
- **Articles** — Miscellaneous board game content including escape rooms, podcasts, and hobby resources.

## Site Statistics

- 107+ posts published
- 49 game reviews
- 14 how-to-play guides
- 24 best-of lists
- 100+ games covered

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://hexagamers.com/
- All Reviews: https://hexagamers.com/category/reviews/
- How-To-Play Guides: https://hexagamers.com/category/how-to-play/
- Best-Of Lists: https://hexagamers.com/category/favourites-lists/
- Articles: https://hexagamers.com/category/miscellaneous/
- All Posts: https://hexagamers.com/blog/
- About: https://hexagamers.com/about/

## Popular Games Covered

7 Wonders, Agricola, Catan, Dominion, Pandemic, Ticket to Ride, Wingspan, Azul, Codenames, Carcassonne, Betrayal at House on the Hill, and many more.

## Affiliate Disclosure

Some links are Amazon affiliate links. Hexagamers earns a small commission on qualifying purchases at no extra cost to readers. Only games genuinely recommended are linked.
